# Suspicious Sender

*Reputation*. An email sender who sends email messages to recipients that never granted explicit permission to that sender.

Some suspicious activity could be unintentional. If a [trusted sender][trusted] sends either an excessive amount of email or sends at an alarming frequency, recipients might flag their messages as [spam][]. A recipient ISP might [throttle] the sender's email messages, send them to [spam traps], or [block][] the emails outright.
